_comment: Copy this file to creator-profile.local.json and fill in real values. The .local.json is gitignored and never committed. This template shows the schema only.
_gitignore_note: creator-profile.local.json is gitignored. Keep real identity details out of git.
notes: Fill in creator_name and document_author first — these are used in generated file metadata and planning-voice outputs. legal_name, business_address, and governing_law_state are the party-identity fields contract drafting and template assembly read; while null, drafts carry placeholders and a profile_gaps entry. provenance is optional: per-field {source_context, source, confidence, verbatim_quote, imported_at} records written by the human when saving a profile-import proposal (implementation/gpt/profile-import/README.md).
